issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling for rate limiting, authentication failures, or missing fields.
The skill is Node.js specific and may not work with other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: create-space-page-hierarchy-with-labels
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B fails to use the correct endpoints for space creation, omits the global type, and does not provide page URLs.

scenarios.name: create-page-with-jira-macro-and-summary
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A omits the required structured‑macro syntax, column specification, and summary placement.
